name: edge-optimize-router
description: Cloudflare Worker for Adobe Optimize at Edge — routes AI/LLM traffic to Adobe edge

EDGE_OPTIMIZE_API_KEY.description: Paste the Adobe LLMO API key. This value will be stored as a secret.

CF_ROUTE.description: Route pattern to attach the worker to. Example: www.example.com/*

CF_ZONE.description: Cloudflare zone name (your domain). Example: example.com
